sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n103322" key="tetra/ghrus" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τετρᾰ´-γηρυς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">υ</itype>, <sense id="n103322.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">four-toned</tr_>, of the tetrachord, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἀοιδά</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0299.tlg001:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Terp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
